description: A university botanist needs to process a 60-second video of a rare Selenicereus grandiflorus (Queen of the Night) flower blooming (/home/ga/Videos/flower_bloom_raw.mp4) for an upcoming publication and website update. Extract high-resolution PNG still frames every 5 seconds to /home/ga/Pictures/bloom_frames/. Create a master clip of the peak bloom segment (0:30 to 0:45) at 1920x1080 using the H.264 codec with audio preserved, saved to /home/ga/Videos/bloom_clips/peak_bloom_master.mp4. Produce a silent web version of the same 0:30 to 0:45 segment downscaled to 640x360 using the VP8 codec in a WebM container, saved to /home/ga/Videos/bloom_clips/peak_bloom_web.webm. Generate a JSON manifest at /home/ga/Documents/manifest.json containing the keys 'project', 'extracted_frame_count', 'master_clip', 'web_clip', and 'web_clip_has_audio' (false).
